items.client_feedback: Capacity changed: owner has 2 to 3 openings now, associate adds capacity end of May and ramps into fall.
items.campaign_effect: Use conservative May pacing and document June capacity ramp before launch approval.
items.report_effect: Show optional Capacity And Lead Goal section when growth goal facts are present.

capacity_notes: Owner has immediate openings for about 2 to 3 clients.
Associate therapist starts at the end of May with openings for 6 clients.
Associate capacity is expected to reach 10 to 12 clients in the fall.

human_review_required: Confirm actual intake close rate after the first conversion data is available.

items.client_feedback: Audience changed: keep young adults and adults, target college students instead of adolescents.
items.campaign_effect: Remove adolescent targeting and add compliant college-student intent.
items.report_effect: Explain that the revised campaign focuses on adults, young adults, and college students.

audience_notes: Target young adults and adults for now.
Target college students instead of adolescents.

items.client_feedback: Geo architecture preference: split campaigns by state.
items.campaign_effect: Create state-specific NY and NJ campaign variants for staged review.
items.report_effect: Describe state split as the revised launch structure.

items.client_feedback: Budget question: clarify management fee versus ad spend and recommend May conservative pacing with June ramp.
items.campaign_effect: Do not force spend. Stage May conservative pacing and require budget approval before launch.
items.report_effect: Show budget pacing as a recommendation and include billing as an internal confirmation item.

billing_questions: Client asked whether the amount already paid applies only to management fee or also to ad spend.

human_review_required: Account manager must confirm billing and ad spend treatment before replying as fact.

items.client_feedback: Group therapy is not active now. Two groups are planned for September.
items.campaign_effect: Pause or exclude group therapy from the active revision build.
items.report_effect: Move groups to a September roadmap note instead of active launch scope.

capacity_notes: Owner has immediate openings for about 2 to 3 clients.
Associate therapist starts at the end of May with openings for 6 clients.
Associate capacity is expected to reach 10 to 12 clients in the fall.
report_goal.pacing_recommendation: Start more conservatively in May, then increase in June when associate capacity begins.
report_goal.assumption_note: Close rate is a planning assumption until confirmed by campaign data.

email_notes: Reference the attached PDF and revised campaign build.
Do not include raw CSV filenames.
Ask account manager to confirm management fee versus ad spend before stating billing details as fact.
